summary: A local TV news segment (WKRN 'News 2' Nashville) reporting that greater-Nashville rent prices fell 4.8% year over year per Realtor.com, with a graphics card of stats, a stock house photo and an aerial neighborhood B-roll, narrated by the anchor. Standard broadcast news package with station bug and chyron, no music track.
notable_text: RENT PRICES FALL IN GREATER NASHVILLE; PRICES DOWN 4.8%; MEDIAN PRICE: $1,474/MONTH; 3RD LARGEST PRICE DROP; NEWS 2 abc
